children.heading: Citizen of Northern Mariana Islands
children.label: a Citizen of Northern Mariana Islands
children.text: Any person who is a citizen of the Northern Mariana Islands, as that term is defined in (), is considered a citizen of the United States for purposes of entry into, permanent residence, and employment in the United States and its territories and possessions.section 24(b) of the Act of December 8, 198397 Stat. 1465

children.heading: Termination
children.label: b Termination
children.text: The provisions of this section shall cease to be effective when section 301 of the Covenant to Establish a Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands in Political Union With the United States () becomes effective pursuant to section 1003(c) of the Covenant.Public Law 94–241
